goal: REQ-2: add a deck-switcher to the Ask-a-Question card-selection board (it only existed on Daily/Full).
done: Added a '.daily-topbar__deck' block (eyebrow + name) to the question-draw topbar in question-draw.html + th/question-draw.html, and call renderDeckName() inside renderQuestionDraw (js/main.js) after the board deals. Reuses the existing machinery with ZERO selector changes: renderDeckName already targets .daily-topbar__deck-name and wires .daily-topbar__deck → .mt-deck-switch, whose pill styling is global (not page-scoped). Small scoped CSS (css/question.css) gives the pill margin under the centred eyebrow. Deck switch goes through showDeckPicker → setActiveDeck → repaintCardBacks(), which repaints THIS board's .card-back slots (the CLAUDE.md post-switch repaint requirement; same setupBoard as Daily, which already repaints correctly). Logged-out tap opens the sign-in gate (deck ownership needs an account).
verified: node --check js/main.js. Headless 390px /question-draw.html?spread=story&topic=love: the 'Moonmallow ▾' deck pill (gradient dot + caret) renders below the STORY SPREAD eyebrow, matching the Daily/Full switcher; board + Shuffle + Reveal spread all intact. EN+TH share js/main.js; both HTML mirrors updated.
